kill_reputation_delta.description: Signed change applied to a killer's standing with this faction per slain faction mob. Usually negative. Defaults to -10 when omitted.

hostile_threshold.description: A faction mob is hostile to any player whose standing is strictly below this value. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

price_modifier_per_point.description: Fractional price shift per standing point at shops aligned to this faction. Friendly standing lowers buy prices and raises sell payouts. Defaults to 0 (no price effect) when omitted.
